cold_open: a hushed starlit wonder, looking up at the night sky, quiet expectant awe
setup: gently curious, measuring something deceptively simple, light cosmic intrigue
the_turn: a humbling realization landing, vast and sobering but still wondrous
escalate: slow expanding scale, one small note against a huge open space, awed
reveal: imaginative and speculative, strange technologies and big ideas, curious sparkle
history: a thoughtful step back in time, an old unanswered question hanging in the air
human_layer: tender and vast, distant islands of light, intimate against immensity
payoff: quietly profound, both directions of the gulf, settling and warm
button: expansive starlit awe, gently soaring and hopeful, the wonder of being here at all
